frontmatter.title: Amal Ahmed
frontmatter.meta: Professor & Associate Dean for Graduate Programs

mainmatter.blockquote: My research involves the use of programming-language semantics and type systems for reasoning about imperative code, security, concurrency, compiler transformations, and provenance.

frontmatter.title: Semantics of Types for Mutable State
frontmatter.meta: @phdthesis{ahmed-2004, author = {Ahmed, Amal Jamil}, school = {Princeton University}, url = {http://www.ccs.neu.edu/home/amal/ahmedthesis.pdf}, year = {2004}, title = {Semantics of Types for Mutable State}, }
